[Unit]
Description=System Reboot
Documentation=man:systemd.special(7)
DefaultDependencies=no
Requires=systemd-reboot.service
After=systemd-reboot.service
AllowIsolate=yes
JobTimeoutSec=30min
JobTimeoutAction=reboot-force

[Install]
Alias=ctrl-alt-del.target
